sourceNote: TCGplayer Authentication Center study, read directly from the primary article (Peter Day, updated 2025-02-27): more than 8,000 Obsidian Flames booster packs opened, per-tier rates with 95% confidence intervals — Double Rare 13.61% ±0.72, Ultra Rare 6.63% ±0.52, Illustration Rare 7.60% ±0.56, Special Illustration Rare 3.13% ±0.37, Hyper Rare 1.92% ±0.29. Obsidian Flames kept the generous early Scarlet & Violet rates, and its small top-rarity pool (only 6 SIRs, 3 HRs) made a specific chase — SIR Charizard ex at 1 in 192 packs — unusually easy to hit for the era. No ACE SPEC tier — that rarity did not return until Temporal Forces (sv5).
